{{Infobox concept
| name = Spiritual pressure
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Spiritual pressure]] is a phenomenon where the spirit recognizes superior power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Spiritual pressure]] is behaving strangely due to an approaching disaster.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Spiritual pressure]] can be exerted using spirit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
